originalTitle: Let’s Make Sense of JEAN GREY In A Spider-Man Movie | Sneak Peek
content: The new Spider-Man Brand New Day trailer seems to confirm that Sadie Sink = Jean Grey. Let’s try to explain this! Sign up for a $1 per month trial at https://www.shopify.com/newrockstars Welcome back to The Sneak Peek on New Rockstars! In this episode, Erik Voss and Jessica Clemons unpack the logic of the mutant Jean Grey being introduced in a Spider-Man movie. Does it really make sense? Why is it so hard for us to accept this?
